<!-- +++No column could be found to attach a LINK in table: J/A+A/688/A187/mcxcii -->
<FIELD name="RAJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.ra;meta.main" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="8" precision="4" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA_MAIN" -->
<FIELD name="DEJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.dec;meta.main" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="8" precision="4" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC_MAIN" -->
<FIELD name="GLON" ucd="pos.galactic.lon" datatype="double" width="8" precision="4" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_GAL_LON" -->
<FIELD name="GLAT" ucd="pos.galactic.lat" datatype="double" width="8" precision="4" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_GAL_LAT" -->
<FIELD name="z" ucd="src.redshift" datatype="double" width="9" precision="6"><!-- ucd="REDSHIFT_HC" -->
<FIELD name="Scale" ucd="arith.factor;instr.scale" datatype="float" width="7" precision="4" unit="kpc/arcsec"><!-- ucd="INST_SCALE" -->
<FIELD name="ERange" ucd="instr.bandpass" datatype="char" arraysize="9" unit="keV"><!-- ucd="OBS_BAND" -->
<FIELD name="Rap" ucd="phys.angSize;src" datatype="float" width="7" precision="4" unit="arcmin"><!-- ucd="EXTENSION_RAD" -->
<DESCRIPTION>? Radius of aperture of flux extraction (-1. for input total flux)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="FX" ucd="phot.flux;em.X-ray" datatype="double" width="9" precision="5" unit="1e-09W.m**-2"><!-- ucd="PHOT_FLUX_X" -->
<FIELD name="e_FX" ucd="stat.error" datatype="double" width="8" precision="5" unit="1e-09W.m**-2"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="Lap" ucd="phys.luminosity;em.X-ray" datatype="double" width="8" precision="5" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="PHYS_LUMINOSITY_X" -->
<DESCRIPTION>? Luminosity within aperture (10^44^erg/s) (-1. for input total flux)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="L500" ucd="phys.luminosity;em.X-ray" datatype="float" width="7" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="PHYS_LUMINOSITY_X" -->
<FIELD name="e_L500" ucd="stat.error" datatype="float" width="7" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="E_L500" ucd="stat.error;stat.max" datatype="float" width="7" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="R500" ucd="phys.size.radius" datatype="float" width="7" precision="4" unit="Mpc"><!-- ucd="PHYS_SIZE_RADIUS_GENERAL" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Radius corresponding to a density contrast of 500</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="M500" ucd="phys.mass" datatype="float" width="7" precision="4" unit="1e+14solMass"><!-- ucd="PHYS_MASS_MISC" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Mass corresponding to a density contrast of 500</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_M500" ucd="stat.error" datatype="float" width="7" unit="1e+14solMass"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="E_M500" ucd="stat.error;stat.max" datatype="float" width="7" unit="1e+14solMass"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="L5001" ucd="phys.luminosity;em.X-ray" datatype="double" width="22" precision="19" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="PHYS_LUMINOSITY_X" -->
<DESCRIPTION>? Luminosity within R500 for first catalogue overlapped (10^44^erg/s)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_L5001" ucd="stat.error" datatype="double" width="22" precision="E15" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="E_L5001" ucd="stat.error;stat.max" datatype="double" width="22" precision="E15" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="L5002" ucd="phys.luminosity;em.X-ray" datatype="double" width="22" precision="19" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="PHYS_LUMINOSITY_X" -->
<DESCRIPTION>? Luminosity within R500 for second catalogue overlapped (10^44^erg/s)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_L5002" ucd="stat.error" datatype="double" width="21" precision="E14" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="E_L5002" ucd="stat.error;stat.max" datatype="double" width="21" precision="E14" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="L5003" ucd="phys.luminosity;em.X-ray" datatype="double" width="20" precision="17" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="PHYS_LUMINOSITY_X" -->
<DESCRIPTION>? Luminosity within R500 for third catalogue overlapped (10^44^erg/s)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_L5003" ucd="stat.error" datatype="double" width="22" precision="19" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="E_L5003" ucd="stat.error;stat.max" datatype="double" width="22" precision="19" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="L5004" ucd="phys.luminosity;em.X-ray" datatype="double" width="20" precision="17" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="PHYS_LUMINOSITY_X" -->
<DESCRIPTION>? Luminosity within R500 for fourth catalogue overlapped (10^44^erg/s)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_L5004" ucd="stat.error" datatype="double" width="21" precision="18" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="E_L5004" ucd="stat.error;stat.max" datatype="double" width="21" precision="18" unit="1e+37W"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Note (expanded) on the cluster as given in the source catalogue (4)</DESCRIPTION>
<DESCRIPTION>? Index in MCXC published by Piffaretti et al., 2011A&A...534A.109P, Cat. J/A+A/534/A109</DESCRIPTION>
